basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Diu Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 22 Resource Person, Primary Teacher and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Resource Person for CWSN, Academic Resource Person for Career Counselling, Primary school Teacher (English Medium), Upper Primary School Teacher (English Medium) - Social Science, Upper Primary School Teacher (English Medium) - English, Part Time Instructor, Special Educator (Secondary)
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Diu Recruitment 2026: Samagra Shiksha Diu is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 22 Various posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Resource Person for CWSN: Maximum 35 years Academic Resource Person for Career Counselling: Maximum 35 years Primary school Teacher (English Medium): Maximum 30 years Upper Primary School Teacher (English Medium): Maximum 30 years Part Time Instructor: Maximum 30 years Special Educator (Secondary): Maximum 30 years

qualification.details: Resource Person for CWSN: Graduate with B.Ed. (Special Education) or equivalent. Academic Resource Person for Career Counselling: Graduation with Diploma in Career Counselling/PG Diploma in Counselling or Masters in Psychology. Primary school Teacher (English Medium): Senior Secondary (XII pass) with at least 50% marks and 2 years Diploma in Elementary Education or equivalent. Upper Primary School Teacher (English Medium): Graduation in B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. and 2 years Diploma in Elementary Education or equivalent. Part Time Instructor: 12th class with Degree/Diploma/certificate in music from a recognized university/institution OR 12th class with Intermediate Education/Graduation and Under Graduate Diploma in Physical Education/B.P.Ed. OR 12th class with Bachelor of Computer Application/B.Sc. (Computer)/B.Sc. (IT)/PGDCA. Special Educator (Secondary): Graduate with B.Ed. (Special Education) or equivalent.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by Samagra Shiksha Diu?
faq.answer: Samagra Shiksha Diu has announced a total of 22 vacancies for various posts. These positions are on a contract basis and will be filled through a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents on the specified date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for the Samagra Shiksha Diu recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is the Walk-in Interview date, which is scheduled for 01 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post. The maximum age limit is 35 years for Resource Person (CWSN) and Academic Resource Person, and 30 years for Primary School Teacher, Upper Primary School Teacher, Part Time Instructor, and Special Educator (Secondary).

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is 12th pass for some posts, while others require graduation with specific diplomas or B.Ed. degrees, particularly in Special Education.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the various posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 12,100/- per month for Part Time Instructor to Rs. 27,000/- per month for Special Educator (Secondary). Other posts have salaries like Rs. 23,000/- and Rs. 25,780/-.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Classroom Demonstration for Primary and Upper Primary posts, a Practical Test for Part Time Work Education, and an Interview for all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Diu. Specific venue details can be found in the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive by Samagra Shiksha Diu.
